title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 376.1369 - Certification of compliance, when
text:
376.1369.  Certification of compliance, when. — A health carrier shall annually provide a written certification to the director that the utilization review program of the health carrier or its designee complies with all applicable state and federal laws establishing confidentiality and reporting requirements.
(L. 1997 H.B. 335)
